Arcteryx Nodin Jacket from the Nodin series is a lightweight, breathable, windproof solid-color shell jacket. Renowned for its popularity, Arcteryx excels from professional outdoor hard shells to casual urban styles and durable soft shells, all receiving consistent praise. Seen everywhere from the Winter Olympics to outdoor adventures and urban luxury fashion.

Made with Nylon 66 double weave, offering high stretch, tensile strength, excellent abrasion resistance, and moisture-wicking. It features top-tier sun protection, slight elasticity for unrestricted movement, and strong weather resistance.

Distinctive 3M custom logo and integrated bird emblem set it apart from other shells. Precision stitching and fully taped hems, cuffs, and hood edges differentiate it from inferior market versions.

Compared to SS23, it upgrades with an internal hidden pocket, removes the SS23 hood print, and introduces a refined integrated label for a more mature look. Three storage options provide versatile outdoor packing. The adjustable, stowable hood is a key highlight, balancing unpredictable weather protection with a sleek appearance.

Available sizes: S to XXL.
